semantic.role: Decision logic for determining the repair action based on syntactic violation reports in the ArchSpine sync system.
responsibilities: Defines the RepairPolicyAction union type with possible values: targeted-repair, prompt-full-rebuild, require-full-rebuild.
Defines the RepairPolicyDecision interface encapsulating the decision outcome, violation metrics, and targeted files.
Implements evaluateRepairPolicy function that classifies violation paths by prefix (.spine/index/ and .spine/atlas/) and maps them to appropriate repair actions.
Builds sets of targeted source files from changed, added, and removed paths, and identifies aggregate-level paths and unmapped paths.
Applies a safe non-interactive downgrade rule to targeted-repair when all aggregate-level violations are already covered by targeted files.
outOfScope: Direct file system or LLM interaction.
Orchestration of full sync or rebuild processes.
invariants: Assumes input report contains valid, non-empty path lists (changedPaths, addedPaths, removedPaths).
Relies on classifyViolationPath and other internal helpers to parse path prefixes.
No side effects; pure decision logic producing a RepairPolicyDecision object.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide centralized, deterministic repair policy evaluation for violation handling, decoupling policy from execution in the sync engine.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 architectural governance layer, establishing semantic contract for repair decisions.

English.role: Decision logic for determining the repair action based on syntactic violation reports in the ArchSpine sync system.
responsibilities: Defines the RepairPolicyAction union type with possible values: targeted-repair, prompt-full-rebuild, require-full-rebuild.
Defines the RepairPolicyDecision interface encapsulating the decision outcome, violation metrics, and targeted files.
Implements evaluateRepairPolicy function that classifies violation paths by prefix and maps them to appropriate repair actions.
Builds sets of targeted source files from changed, added, and removed paths, and identifies aggregate-level paths and unmapped paths.
Applies a safe non-interactive downgrade rule to targeted-repair when all aggregate-level violations are already covered by targeted files.
outOfScope: Direct file system or LLM interaction.
Orchestration of full sync or rebuild processes.

Simplified Chinese.role: 基于语法违规报告确定修复操作的决策逻辑，属于 ArchSpine 同步系统的核心组件。
responsibilities: 定义 RepairPolicyAction 联合类型，包含三种可能的修复策略：targeted-repair、prompt-full-rebuild、require-full-rebuild。
定义 RepairPolicyDecision 接口，封装决策结果、违规指标及目标文件集合。
实现 evaluateRepairPolicy 函数，根据违规路径前缀（.spine/index/ 和 .spine/atlas/）进行分类并映射到适当的修复动作。
从已变更、新增和移除的路径中构建目标源文件集合，并识别聚合级路径和未映射路径。
当所有聚合级违规均已由目标文件覆盖时，应用安全非交互降级规则，回退为 targeted-repair。
outOfScope: 直接的文件系统或 LLM 交互。
全量同步或重建过程的编排。
